mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are negative in >55% of rate-cut months, or Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20d returns occur in >60% of triggered instances, or signal loses predictive power when UNRATE < 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized demand growth across consumer and capital goods sectors, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST yields negative 60d returns in >50% of cases, or interaction term IC < 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production signals weakening manufacturing output and supply-side bottlenecks, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days when inflation expectations exceed 3%.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines produce positive 5d returns in >65% of high-inflation periods, or signal fails to separate returns when CPIAUCSL growth < 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above a 0.3% monthly threshold forces expectations of tighter monetary policy and higher discount rates, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns remain positive in >55% of high-inflation months, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising household income, which supports corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth yields negative 60d returns in >50% of observations, or signal IC drops below 0.01 across all market conditions.

mechanism_narrative: Weak real GDP growth combined with rising unemployment indicates a demand shock that reduces corporate profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition of low GDPC1 growth and rising UNRATE results in positive 20d returns in >60% of cases, or interaction effect is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly expansion in industrial production signals robust manufacturing demand and improving supply chain throughput, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO surges above 0.4% yield negative 5d returns in >55% of instances, or signal loses predictive power during inventory accumulation phases.
